creator: davor.cubranic@alumni.cs.ubc.ca
text: I tried running Vermaden's Perl script on a freshly installed 10.1-RELEASE on a ThinkPad 430s with 8GB RAM and a 2G swap zvol on an SSD with no tuning whatsoever. I experienced no lockups: the script was killed after about a minute and I barely even saw any slowdown in the interactive console.
